title: Reis Blood Pattern
wikitext:
[]: Rei's Blood Pattern             Quote Post by Replicator » Wed Nov 07, 2012 10:27 am After watching Death, during the battle with Kaworu/Tabris, when Kaworu/Tabris activates Unit-02, the MAGI identify him as Blood Pattern Blue and the 17th Angel. I noticed for the first time shortly after when Rei is detected in Terminal Dogma, the NERV staff panic at the appearance of another AT Field. Aoba says "Negative. Confirmation impossible", as the MAGI analyze the second AT Field. Then the target disappeared, and a shot of Rei appears. Now, what would Rei's Blood Pattern probably be, or is there some sort of explanation for her, being grown from Lilith (using Lilin genes), and housing Lilith's soul. In Episode 24, Kaworu says Rei is the same as he is, possibly implying them both being vessels for Seeds in Lilin form. Also in the same episode, we see Rei (III) has abilities similar to Kaworu/Tabris (or any other Angel). This question undoubtbly leads to ask more, such as how the two were created in the first place. I was always under the impression Kaworu/Tabris was created from Lilin genes 'fusing' with Adam, which would mean he has genes from a Lilin , even though the physical material he was made from was Adam's. Rei was possibly also created in a similar fashion (minus an Impact). And in EoE, When Lilith and Adam merge, the resultant being also registered as "Blood Pattern Blue", despite the NERV staff calling it human. It's this line that makes me sort of think the MAGI might already have had the order of the Angels programmed into them, and when Kaworu/Tabris was detected, it could have just matched him (being Blood Pattern Blue) with the 17th Angel. Rei. and the Lilith/Adam entity were outside of the MAGI's scope, when determining if a subject was an Angel. Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Nov 07, 2012 4:07 pm confirmation is impossible because the two uberfields are screwing up sensors. She almost certainly does register as type:blue, but the magi is programed to filter her out when making reports because 1) that's supposed to be a secret and 2) it would be annoying as hell if that was going off all day every day. Most likely what that's really referring to is if the object in question is LCL-based, PWM-based, or just plain normal matter that obeys laws of chemistry and such.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Thu Nov 08, 2012 7:19 am NemZ wrote: She almost certainly does register as type:blue, but the magi is programed to filter her out when making reports because 1) that's supposed to be a secret and 2) it would be annoying as hell if that was going off all day every day. Most likely what that's really referring to is if the object in question is LCL-based, PWM-based, or just plain normal matter that obeys laws of chemistry and such.

[]:             Quote Post by Replicator » Thu Nov 08, 2012 8:59 am Jornophelanthas wrote: I think it's more like the MAGI disregard any AT-field below a certain threshold of intensity. Recall that every human has a personal AT-field. Registering and testing every single one of those for "type: blue" would waste the resources of the trifold supercomputer.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Thu Nov 08, 2012 9:17 am I find it more likely that "type: blue" indicates a life-form descended from Adam, while life descended from Lilith has a different type. Recall that Lilim (the human race), Evangelion Unit-01, and Rei Ayanami (both body and soul) are all products of Lilith. (Kaworu is unclear, because he is clearly an Adam-descended Angel in spirit, but it is never revealed if his body was grown from Adam-matter, or through genetic engineering of regular human DNA (Lilith-matter), or a mixture of both. We also don't know if it's an entity's body or soul (or both) that determines the nature of the AT field.) Note also that Unit-00, Unit-02 and Unit-03, as well as all the MP EVAs, were created from the body of Adam, and would thus potentially register as "type: blue". However, perhaps NERV succeeded in using a combination of bio-engineering and technology built into the armor in order to change the AT-field nature such that it no longer registers as "type: blue". Finally, note that Unit-01, Unit-02 and Unit-03 all have human souls implanted in them. Unit-00 has a non-human, but Lilith-based soul. We have no information on whether the Mass-Produced Evangelions even have souls or AT-fields, or what nature these would have.

[]:             Quote Post by Replicator » Thu Nov 08, 2012 12:25 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: Recall that Lilim (the human race), Evangelion Unit-01, and Rei Ayanami (both body and soul) are all products of Lilith.
